items.title: June 25, 1997: With the second pick in the NBA Draft, the Philadelphia 76ers select Keith Van Horn from the University of Utah.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 25, 1997: With the second pick in the NBA Draft, the Philadelphia 76ers select Keith Van Horn from the University of Utah.

Van Horn was then traded to the New Jersey Nets—along with Michael Cage, Lucious Harris and Don MacLean—for Jim Jackson, Eric Montross, Anthony Parker and Tim Thomas.
